channel.title: Cognitive Linguistics
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Cognitive Linguistics

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Francisco Javier García Yanes DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cog-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Language change in a constructional network: the emergence of Mandarin [bi N hai N] comparative constructions
item.description: Article by Francisco Javier García Yanes DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cog-2024-0019

item.title: Comprehension of object relatives in Spanish: the role of frequency and transparency in acquisition and adult grammar
item.description: Article by Francisco Javier García Yanes DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cog-2024-0016

item.title: The interplay of verbs and argument structure constructions in second language processing: roles of verb’s lexical properties and verb–construction association
item.description: Article by Francisco Javier García Yanes DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cog-2024-0042

item.title: Sociopragmatic pronouns in Limburgian: inferring speakers’ agency from self-reported automaticity, attitudes, and metalinguistic awareness
item.description: Article by Francisco Javier García Yanes DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cog-2023-0141

item.title: Event conflation in high stakes testing: a comparison of usage and relationship to writing scores by language types
item.description: Article by Francisco Javier García Yanes DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cog-2024-0005

item.title: Corrigendum to: Force dynamics as the path to the Spanish subjunctive
item.description: Article by Francisco Javier García Yanes DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cog-2024-2001
